'''''Denunciator''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] which was present at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
